h20cdb600gd194g4473gb88dgb5ce4e89e42e: If any of your stuff goes missing, just let me know. You're family now.
hd8e417d6gf542g4846g939ag00ff0269acf0: Somebody stole the idol. If I find out who it was... I'll recruit 'em.
h7c751295ged01g4800gbf44g7cddfc734b2a: You're alive! Did you get the idol? Is that why they went crazy?
h6e2359c2gef46g4d31gbc61g64a97d153ed8: Doesn't matter. It's over - and the idol's all yours.
h91880b76g7b1cg4440g9883g610bb102b54d: Thanks. See you in Baldur's Gate, I hope. Now scram, before I get emotional.
hf2544512g18a5g4700g96e9g9f6514c1d290: Yes. And after what I just went through, I'm keeping the damn thing.
h87b07848gd51bg4d6cga41cgee85c6238f51: Can't say I blame you. But we did have a deal.
hfc3387cfgc6a7g48b6ga37agd465c4c0e80a: And now the deal's off. Bye, kid.
hec6d7dadgdbb4g4b9agaeedg80e34a7f0bbf: Fine. Hope the damn thing's cursed.
h6e5cd75agf8d2g49abga897g96a2ca1507bb: Here's some free advice, more valuable than gold: don't bargain, just take.
h6d7c64bdgbc1fg46dcgb358g5ebd8e99603e: Sounds more like a challenge than advice. Keep an eye on your pack.
h561a1e77g62a7g48e5gb1aeg46b9a6516419: I don't have it. Let's just be glad we're alive.

h89a618a6g593fg40e1gb5b1g37aab313acbe: You're a terrible liar. We had a deal.
h929971c2gb2a6g473cga0c1g073be5ee3663: Nothing to see here. We're clearing out soon.
